title: Light And Color.
content:
Thou that art ever the same, with the changeless One take up thy dwelling!
    Color, thou changeable one, kindly descends upon man!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "Light And Color.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
